docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Under heavy construction, mind the mess!

Welcome to Heartfire's Cavern, a static site created with mkdocs with the express purpose of providing a central place to find documention and download links for my projects.

If you need to contact me, or just want to know a little about me, please check the "About" page.

If you're looking for my public code repositories, please check my Github profile.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text:
My name is Heartfire, or Daniel, if you prefer.

I have been a Python programmer for nearly a decade, and during that time, i have created many personal-use tools to help me automate repetitive tasks.

I have also programmed a handful of games during that time, with my most recent being a Roguelike named "Underhand".

docs.title: About
docs.text: Underhand is a Turn-Based Roguelike, that aims to deliver a gameplay experience without the common pitfalls present in many modern roguelikes, such as cheap deaths and confusing mechanics

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• A procedurally generated dungeon
  • Many different types of enemy, each with their own strengths and weaknesses
  • A selection of arms and armor to choose from
  • Gather spells that can Confuse and Immolate your foes
